member.name: T:EasySlack.AsyncEventHandler`1
member.summary: Represents an asynchronous event handler.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous handler invocation.

member.name: T:EasySlack.Internal.IManagedWebSocket
member.summary: Provides an abstraction over a client WebSocket for testability.

member.name: P:EasySlack.Internal.IManagedWebSocket.State
member.summary: Gets the current WebSocket state.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.IManagedWebSocket.ConnectAsync(System.Uri,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the supplied URI.
member.returns: A task that completes when connected.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.IManagedWebSocket.ReceiveAsync(System.ArraySegment{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Receives data from the WebSocket.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.IManagedWebSocket.SendTextAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a text message.
member.returns: A task that completes when the send finishes.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.IManagedWebSocket.CloseAsync(System.Net.WebSockets.WebSocketCloseStatus,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Closes the WebSocket.
member.returns: A task that completes when the close finishes.

member.name: T:EasySlack.Internal.IManagedWebSocketFactory
member.summary: Creates managed WebSocket instances.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.IManagedWebSocketFactory.Create
member.summary: Creates a new managed WebSocket.

member.name: T:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocket
member.summary: Adapts to .

member.name: P:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocket.State
member.summary: Gets the current WebSocket state.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocket.ConnectAsync(System.Uri,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the supplied URI.
member.returns: A task that completes when connected.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocket.ReceiveAsync(System.ArraySegment{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Receives data from the WebSocket.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocket.SendTextAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a text message.
member.returns: A task that completes when the send finishes.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocket.CloseAsync(System.Net.WebSockets.WebSocketCloseStatus,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Closes the WebSocket.
member.returns: A task that completes when the close finishes.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocket.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the WebSocket resources.

member.name: T:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocketFactory
member.summary: Creates instances.

member.name: M:EasySlack.Internal.ManagedClientWebSocketFactory.Create
member.summary: Creates a new managed WebSocket.

member.name: T:EasySlack.Internal.SocketModeEnvelopeProcessor
member.summary: Parses Socket Mode envelopes and dispatches recognized events.
Processes a raw Socket Mode payload.
member.returns: A task that completes when processing finishes.

member.name: T:EasySlack.ISlackConnector
member.summary: Defines the public API surface for a Slack connector.

member.name: P:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.Logger
member.summary: Gets or sets the diagnostic logger callback.

member.name: E:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.MessageReceived
member.summary: Fired when a plain Slack message event is received. Events with a non-empty subtype are skipped.

member.name: E:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.Connected
member.summary: Fired when the connector establishes or re-establishes a Socket Mode connection.

member.name: E:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.Disconnected
member.summary: Fired when the connector loses its Socket Mode connection.

member.name: E:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.ActionRequired
member.summary: Fired when Slack reports a condition that likely requires user intervention.

member.name: P:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.ConnectionState
member.summary: Gets the current connection state.

member.name: M:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the Socket Mode connection.
member.returns: A task that completes when the initial connection is established.

member.name: M:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stops the Socket Mode connection.
member.returns: A task that completes when the connector is stopped.

member.name: M:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.ValidateConnectionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the configured Slack bot token.

member.name: M:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.SendMessageToUserAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message to a Slack user by opening or reusing a direct conversation.

member.name: M:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.SendMessageToChannelAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message to a Slack channel or conversation.
member.param: The Slack thread root timestamp to reply into, or for a top-level message.

member.name: M:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.GetChannelInfoAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves Slack conversation metadata.

member.name: M:EasySlack.ISlackConnector.GetUserInfoAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves Slack user metadata.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackActionRequiredEventArgs
member.summary: Provides details about a condition that may require operator attention.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackActionRequiredEventArgs.Code
member.summary: Gets or sets the machine-friendly action code.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackActionRequiredEventArgs.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the human-readable description.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackActionRequiredEventArgs.RawPayload
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw payload associated with the condition.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackAuthMaterial
member.summary: Stores the Slack tokens required by the connector.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackAuthMaterial.BotToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack bot token.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackAuthMaterial.AppToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack app token used for Socket Mode.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackAuthMaterial.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackAuthMaterial.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackChannelInfoResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a Slack conversation info request.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackChannelInfoResult.Ok
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the request succeeded.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackChannelInfoResult.Error
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack error code when available.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackChannelInfoResult.ChannelId
member.summary: Gets or sets the conversation identifier.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackChannelInfoResult.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the conversation name.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackChannelInfoResult.IsChannel
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the conversation is a channel.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackChannelInfoResult.IsPrivate
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the conversation is private.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackConnectedEventArgs
member.summary: Provides connection established event data.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnectedEventArgs.IsReconnect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the connection is a reconnection.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnectedEventArgs.SocketUri
member.summary: Gets or sets the socket URI used for the connection.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackConnectionState
member.summary: Represents the connector connection state.

member.name: F:EasySlack.SlackConnectionState.Disconnected
member.summary: The connector is not connected.

member.name: F:EasySlack.SlackConnectionState.Connecting
member.summary: The connector is currently connecting.

member.name: F:EasySlack.SlackConnectionState.Connected
member.summary: The connector is connected.

member.name: F:EasySlack.SlackConnectionState.Stopping
member.summary: The connector is stopping.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackConnector
member.summary: Implements a native Slack connector using Slack Web API and Socket Mode.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnector.Logger
member.summary: Gets or sets the diagnostic logger callback.

member.name: E:EasySlack.SlackConnector.MessageReceived
member.summary: Fired when a plain Slack message event is received. Events with a non-empty subtype are skipped.

member.name: E:EasySlack.SlackConnector.Connected
member.summary: Fired when the connector establishes or re-establishes a Socket Mode connection.

member.name: E:EasySlack.SlackConnector.Disconnected
member.summary: Fired when the connector loses its Socket Mode connection.

member.name: E:EasySlack.SlackConnector.ActionRequired
member.summary: Fired when Slack reports a condition that likely requires user intervention.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnector.ConnectionState
member.summary: Gets the current connection state.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.#ctor(EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.#ctor(EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions,System.Threading.CancellationTokenSource)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the Socket Mode connection.
member.returns: A task that completes when the initial connection is established.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stops the Socket Mode connection.
member.returns: A task that completes when the connector is stopped.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.ValidateConnectionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the configured Slack bot token.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.SendMessageToUserAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message to a Slack user by opening or reusing a direct conversation.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.SendMessageToChannelAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a message to a Slack channel or conversation.
member.param: The Slack thread root timestamp to reply into, or for a top-level message.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.GetChannelInfoAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves Slack conversation metadata.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.GetUserInfoAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves Slack user metadata.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.Dispose
member.summary: Releases connector resources.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnector.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Releases connector resources asynchronously.
member.returns: A task that completes when disposal is finished.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions
member.summary: Configures connector behavior.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions.Auth
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack authentication material.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions.AutoReconnect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the connector should automatically reconnect.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions.InitialReconnectDelayMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the initial reconnect delay in milliseconds.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions.MaxReconnectDelayMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum reconnect delay in milliseconds.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions.ReceiveBufferSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the receive buffer size in bytes.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions.ApiBaseUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the Web API base URL.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:EasySlack.SlackConnectorOptions.#ctor(EasySlack.SlackAuthMaterial)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackDisconnectedEventArgs
member.summary: Provides connection lost event data.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackDisconnectedEventArgs.Reason
member.summary: Gets or sets the disconnect reason.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackDisconnectedEventArgs.WillReconnect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the connector will attempt reconnection.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackDisconnectedEventArgs.Exception
member.summary: Gets or sets the exception that caused the disconnect when applicable.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackMessageReceivedEventArgs
member.summary: Provides data for an inbound Slack message event.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackMessageReceivedEventArgs.ChannelId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack conversation identifier.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackMessageReceivedEventArgs.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack user identifier.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackMessageReceivedEventArgs.Text
member.summary: Gets or sets the message text.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackMessageReceivedEventArgs.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack timestamp for the specific inbound message.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackMessageReceivedEventArgs.ThreadTimestamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack thread root timestamp when the message belongs to a thread. This is usually for top-level messages.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackMessageReceivedEventArgs.Subtype
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack event subtype.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackMessageReceivedEventArgs.RawPayload
member.summary: Gets or sets the raw JSON payload.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackSendMessageResult
member.summary: Represents the result of posting a Slack message.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackSendMessageResult.Ok
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the send succeeded.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackSendMessageResult.Error
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack error code when available.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackSendMessageResult.ChannelId
member.summary: Gets or sets the destination conversation identifier.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackSendMessageResult.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack timestamp for the created message.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a Slack user info request.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult.Ok
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the request succeeded.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult.Error
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack error code when available.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the user identifier.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult.UserName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack username.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult.RealName
member.summary: Gets or sets the user real name.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets the user display name.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult.IsBot
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user is a bot.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackUserInfoResult.IsDeleted
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user is deleted.

member.name: T:EasySlack.SlackValidationResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a Slack auth validation request.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackValidationResult.Ok
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether validation succeeded.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackValidationResult.Error
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack error code when available.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackValidationResult.TeamId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack team identifier.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackValidationResult.TeamName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Slack team name.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackValidationResult.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the authenticated user identifier.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackValidationResult.UserName
member.summary: Gets or sets the authenticated user name.

member.name: P:EasySlack.SlackValidationResult.BotId
member.summary: Gets or sets the authenticated bot identifier.
